title: Blue Jasmine
creator: Woody Allen
description: A former New York socialite tries to rebuild her life after everything falls apart.
whyForActors: Cate Blanchett won the Academy Award for Best Actress for this role.

title: All About Eve
creator: Joseph L. Mankiewicz
description: An ambitious young woman enters the orbit of a celebrated theatre star.
whyForActors: Bette Davis plays Margo Channing, a stage actress central to the story.

title: A Woman Under the Influence
creator: John Cassavetes
description: A woman’s inner world strains against the expectations of family and marriage.
whyForActors: Gena Rowlands received an Academy Award nomination for this performance.

title: Manchester by the Sea
creator: Kenneth Lonergan
description: A man returns home after a family tragedy and is forced to face his past.
whyForActors: Casey Affleck won the Academy Award for Best Actor for this role.

title: Portrait of a Lady on Fire
creator: Céline Sciamma
description: An artist is commissioned to paint a young woman’s portrait.
whyForActors: Notice how much of the interaction is carried through silence and eye contact.

title: Black Swan
creator: Darren Aronofsky
description: A dancer’s pursuit of perfection begins to blur reality.
whyForActors: Natalie Portman won the Academy Award for Best Actress.

title: There Will Be Blood
creator: Paul Thomas Anderson
description: An oilman’s rise to power in early California.
whyForActors: Daniel Day-Lewis won the Academy Award for Best Actor.

title: Moonlight
creator: Barry Jenkins
description: A young man’s life is explored across three stages.
whyForActors: The central character is portrayed by three actors.

title: Lady Bird
creator: Greta Gerwig
description: A teenager navigates relationships and identity.
whyForActors: Saoirse Ronan received an Academy Award nomination.

title: The Favourite
creator: Yorgos Lanthimos
description: A power struggle unfolds in Queen Anne’s court.
whyForActors: Olivia Colman won the Academy Award for Best Actress.

title: Call Me by Your Name
creator: Luca Guadagnino
description: A summer relationship unfolds in Northern Italy.
whyForActors: The story focuses on a single relationship over time.

title: The Social Network
creator: David Fincher
description: The founding of Facebook and the disputes that followed.
whyForActors: Known for fast-paced and overlapping dialogue.

title: Room
creator: Lenny Abrahamson
description: A mother and child adjust to life after captivity.
whyForActors: Brie Larson won the Academy Award for Best Actress.

title: Her
creator: Spike Jonze
description: A man develops a relationship with an AI system.
whyForActors: The central relationship involves an unseen character.

title: Whiplash
creator: Damien Chazelle
description: A young drummer trains under an intense instructor.
whyForActors: Focuses on a demanding mentor-student relationship.

title: Lost in Translation
creator: Sofia Coppola
description: Two strangers form a connection in Tokyo.
whyForActors: Much of the story unfolds through quiet interactions.

title: Before Sunrise
creator: Richard Linklater
description: Two strangers meet and spend a night in Vienna.
whyForActors: The film is driven almost entirely by conversation.

title: Before Sunset
creator: Richard Linklater
description: Two people reunite years after their first meeting.
whyForActors: Takes place in real time over a single afternoon.

title: Before Midnight
creator: Richard Linklater
description: A couple reflects on their relationship years later.
whyForActors: Focuses on long-form relationship dynamics.

title: Marriage Story
creator: Noah Baumbach
description: A couple navigates separation and family life.
whyForActors: Features extended two-person scenes.

title: The Piano
creator: Jane Campion
description: A woman communicates through her piano in a new land.
whyForActors: The lead character does not speak for most of the film.

title: Fences
creator: Denzel Washington
description: A working-class family navigates life in 1950s Pittsburgh.
whyForActors: Adapted from August Wilson’s stage play.

title: Doubt
creator: John Patrick Shanley
description: A nun confronts a priest over a suspicion.
whyForActors: The story is built around uncertainty rather than resolution.

title: The Reader
creator: Stephen Daldry
description: A young man reflects on a past relationship.
whyForActors: Kate Winslet won the Academy Award for Best Actress.

title: Atonement
creator: Joe Wright
description: A misunderstanding changes the course of multiple lives.
whyForActors: The story spans multiple time periods.

title: The Talented Mr. Ripley
creator: Anthony Minghella
description: A young man becomes entangled in a wealthy social circle.
whyForActors: Focuses on identity and imitation.

title: Parasite
creator: Bong Joon-ho
description: Two families become intertwined in unexpected ways.
whyForActors: Won the Academy Award for Best Picture.

title: Joker
creator: Todd Phillips
description: A man’s descent into isolation and notoriety.
whyForActors: Joaquin Phoenix won the Academy Award for Best Actor.

title: Silver Linings Playbook
creator: David O. Russell
description: Two people form an unexpected connection.
whyForActors: Jennifer Lawrence won the Academy Award for Best Actress.

title: The King’s Speech
creator: Tom Hooper
description: A king works to overcome a speech impediment.
whyForActors: Colin Firth won the Academy Award for Best Actor.

title: Little Women
creator: Greta Gerwig
description: The lives of four sisters unfold across time.
whyForActors: The narrative moves between different time periods.

title: Brooklyn
creator: John Crowley
description: A young woman emigrates from Ireland to New York.
whyForActors: Saoirse Ronan received an Academy Award nomination.

title: The Shape of Water
creator: Guillermo del Toro
description: A mute woman forms a connection with a mysterious creature.
whyForActors: Won the Academy Award for Best Picture.

title: Nocturnal Animals
creator: Tom Ford
description: A woman reads a manuscript that mirrors her past.
whyForActors: The story moves between reality and fiction.

title: Drive
creator: Nicolas Winding Refn
description: A driver becomes involved in a dangerous situation.
whyForActors: The central character speaks very little.
